summary: Tested backend APIs (14 pytest tests, 100% pass) and frontend public search + admin login navigation. Backend fully functional including auth, tutorials CRUD, semantic search (vector + text fallback), and PDF file serving via object storage. Frontend public search page loads cleanly with proper Indonesian copy and renders empty-state correctly. Admin login route at '/admin/login' returned a blank page - the React Router reports 'No routes matched location /admin/login'. Test agent did not click the visible 'Login Admin' button to discover the actual route; main agent should verify frontend admin login route mapping.

ui_bugs.issue: Direct navigation to /admin/login renders blank white page; console warns 'No routes matched location /admin/login'. The route path used by the 'Login Admin' button must be verified (likely /admin-login or /login). Update routing or fix link target.

issues: Clean minimalist design with Navy header text and light-green search button matches spec
Footer / brand absent (only 'Made with Emergent' badge) - acceptable for MVP

action_items: Verify and fix admin login route path. The Public page has a 'Login Admin' button - main agent should confirm the route it links to and ensure direct navigation to that URL works (and add /admin/login alias if reasonable).
Re-test admin dashboard flow (upload form: title/category/content/PDF, table listing, delete, logout) once the admin login route is reachable.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 304-308: Using File(...) for plain text form fields (title, category, content) is unusual - should use Form(...) for clarity. Currently works because FastAPI accepts multipart fields either way, but Form() is the idiomatic choice.
server.py login (line 247-264): cookies are set with secure=False; for production behind HTTPS, should be secure=True. Acceptable for current preview env.
Missing brute-force / rate-limit protection on /api/auth/login (playbook expects lockout after 5 failed attempts). Not implemented.
JWT_SECRET has a strong default in .env - good. Access token 15 min, refresh token 7 days - sensible.
seed_admin logic is idempotent and updates password if changed (line 530-535) - good.
/api/files/{path} requires the tutorial to exist with matching pdf_path (line 490). Good security boundary - prevents arbitrary object storage reads.

Vector search uses MongoDB $vectorSearch which requires Atlas Search index 'tutorial_embedding_index'. Local MongoDB does NOT support $vectorSearch - so in this environment search always falls back to regex text search (verified by test - search returned results without error via fallback path).
seed_data_creation: Test tutorials created in tests are auto-cleaned via fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py covers auth, CRUD, search and file serving (14 tests, all passing). For frontend re-test: click the 'Login Admin' top-right button on the public page to discover the real admin login route, then exercise the upload form (data-testids: search-input, search-button confirmed; expected: login-email, login-password, login-submit, upload-title, upload-category, upload-content, upload-pdf, upload-submit, tutorials-table, logout-button). Local Mongo lacks $vectorSearch index so semantic search falls back to regex - that's expected behavior, not a bug.
